rag_rules: Place AGREE annex blocks in component type scopes for port-level assumptions and guarantees, and in implementation scopes for bindings after subcomponents and connections.
Use visible feature names and legal constants in AGREE contracts; avoid subcomponent ports in type-level contracts.
generic_rules: Ensure AGREE annex blocks are placed in valid AADL scopes: component types for assumptions/guarantees, implementations for bindings.
When defining range checks, use visible identifiers and legal AADL types (bool, int, real) in expressions.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must use valid AADL types and visible identifiers; expressions like 'x >= min_value and x <= max_value' are preferred for range checks.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type scopes or use subcomponent ports in type-level contracts.
